title: Config
description: Root config.yml or any import file for workflow-runner. All top-level keys are optional in individual files; they are merged before validation.

imports.description: Additional YAML files to merge, relative to .workflow/

vars.description: Named variables. Use `{{vars.<key>}}` in task prompts for interpolation.

commands.description: Shell command patterns forbidden from running (substring or /regex/ match).

files.description: File path patterns forbidden from editing (glob or /regex/).

Task.description:
One task in a workflow.

Task modes (mutually exclusive; checked at runtime): - `prompt` and/or `skills`: automated task executed by an agent. - `agents`: parallel custom-agent task; each element is a name under `.claude/agents/`.

agents.description: Names of custom agents (defined in `.claude/agents/<name>.md`) to spawn in parallel. Mutually exclusive with `prompt` and `skills`.

approval.description: If true, pause the workflow after this task completes and wait for developer approval.

deny.description: Explicit deny rules for files and shell commands.

id.description: Unique task identifier within the workflow. Pattern: `^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$`

outputs.description: File path patterns the agent is expected to create or modify (glob or /regex/). Non-empty list restricts editing to matching paths only while InProgress.

prompt.description: Prompt sent to the agent. Supports `{{vars.<key>}}` interpolation. Mutually exclusive with `agents`.

requires.description: IDs of tasks that must complete before this task starts (checked at runtime).

skills.description: Names of skills to invoke for this task. Mutually exclusive with `agents`.

task.description: Concise task name shown in the task list. Required for manual tasks.

tasks.description: Tasks to execute. At least one task is required (checked at runtime).
